description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and adds a mongo service. Define variables db=mongodb://mongo/contacts, node_env=Dev, and port='1337'. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq nodejs npm, then nodejs -v, which nodejs, npm install, and creates a symlink ln -s $(which nodejs) /usr/bin/node. Add a test job in the test stage that executes npm test. The pipeline runs the test job with the mongo service and the defined variables.
